message:
feat(core): add password hashing and load testing modules

PBKDF2-HMAC-SHA256 password hasher with timing-safe verification and
load test runner with configurable concurrency, warmup, and percentile
latency reporting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"fastapi_rust-3f1","title":"Error handling with Outcome integration","description":"Integrate asupersync's 4-valued Outcome for error handling:

## Outcome Mapping
- Outcome::Ok(response) - Successful response
- Outcome::Err(error) - Application/validation error -> HTTP error response
- Outcome::Cancelled(reason) - Client disconnect/timeout -> 499 or 504
- Outcome::Panicked(info) - Handler panic -> 500 Internal Server Error

## Error Conversion
- HTTPException -> Outcome::Err with status code
- RequestValidationError -> Outcome::Err with 422
- CancelledError -> Outcome::Cancelled
- panic!() -> Outcome::Panicked (caught by region)

## Cancel Reasons
- Client disconnected -> CancelReason::user("client disconnected")
- Budget exhausted -> CancelReason::budget_exhausted()
- Server shutdown -> CancelReason::user("server shutdown")

## Test Requirements
- Unit: Each Outcome variant mapped correctly
- Unit: Error types produce correct HTTP status
- Integration: Cancelled request cleanup
- Integration: Panic recovery","acceptance_criteria":"Request cancellation produces Outcome::Cancelled, errors produce Outcome::Err.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","estimated_minutes":90,"created_at":"2026-01-17T14:08:08.314411487Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-19T02:32:19.271458920Z","closed_at":"2026-01-18T15:43:51.719035743Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["asupersync","cross-cutting","errors"]}
 {"id":"fastapi_rust-3mg","title":"Security extractors test suite","description":"Comprehensive test suite for security:

TEST CATEGORIES:

1. BEARER TOKEN
- Valid Authorization header
- Missing header (auto_error=true)
- Missing header (auto_error=false)
- Invalid format (not 'Bearer xxx')
- Empty token

2. BASIC AUTH
- Valid Authorization: Basic xxx
- Invalid base64
- Missing colon in decoded
- Empty username/password
- WWW-Authenticate header

3. API KEYS
- Header extraction
- Query param extraction
- Cookie extraction
- Custom names
- Missing key handling

4. OAUTH2
- OAuth2PasswordBearer flow
- Token URL configuration
- Scope extraction
- SecurityScopes injection

5. OPENAPI SECURITY
- Security scheme generation
- Security requirement on routes
- Multiple security options
- Scope documentation

6. ERROR RESPONSES
- 401 status code
- WWW-Authenticate headers
- JSON error body

 {"id":"fastapi_rust-3yc","title":"Validation system test suite","description":"Comprehensive test suite for validation:

TEST CATEGORIES:

1. STRING VALIDATORS
- min_length with edge cases (0, 1, boundary)
- max_length with edge cases
- Combined min/max_length
- pattern/regex matching
- Email format validation
- URL format validation

2. NUMERIC VALIDATORS
- gt/ge/lt/le combinations
- Boundary value testing
- multiple_of validation
- Float special values (NaN, Inf if allowed)
- Decimal places/digits (if supported)

3. NESTED VALIDATION
- Struct containing validated struct
- Vec of validated items
- HashMap with validated values
- Optional validated fields

4. CUSTOM VALIDATORS
- Sync custom validator
- Async custom validator
- Validator with context
- Validator with dependencies

5. ERROR FORMATTING
- Single error format
- Multiple errors aggregation
- Error location paths
- Error context inclusion
- FastAPI-compatible JSON

6. INTEGRATION
- Extractor with validation (ValidJson, ValidQuery)
- Multiple validation errors in one request
- Validation error response format

 {"id":"fastapi_rust-47p","title":"Path type converters ({id:int}, {path:path})","description":"Implement path parameter type converters:

SYNTAX (per FastAPI/Starlette):
/items/{item_id}        -> String (default)
/items/{item_id:int}    -> i64
/items/{item_id:float}  -> f64
/items/{item_id:path}   -> String (matches slashes)
/items/{item_id:uuid}   -> Uuid

PATH CONVERTER:
- {file_path:path} matches 'a/b/c.txt'
- Useful for file serving routes
- Only valid at end of pattern

VALIDATION:
- :int must be valid integer
- :float must be valid float
- :uuid must be valid UUID format
- Invalid -> 404 or 422

ROUTING IMPACT:
- Type converter affects matching
- /items/{id:int} won't match /items/abc
- More specific converters preferred

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
- All converters implemented
- Validation on mismatch
- Path converter captures slashes
- OpenAPI shows types

TEST REQUIREMENTS:
- Unit: Each converter
- Unit: Invalid input handling
- Unit: Path with slashes
- Integration: Route matching","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-17T15:13:53.350289994Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-21T19:56:35.383410308Z","closed_at":"2026-01-21T19:56:35.383353301Z","close_reason":"done","closed_by_session":"SilverHeron-path-converters","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["converters","phase-2","routing"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"fastapi_rust-47p","depends_on_id":"fastapi_rust-cik","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-28T00:10:32Z","created_by":"import"}]}

 {"id":"fastapi_rust-biz","title":"Request and Response special parameter injection","description":"Implement special parameter type injection:

SPECIAL TYPES (per FastAPI):
- Request: Full request object access
- Response: Mutable response object
- HTTPConnection: Base connection
- BackgroundTasks: Task queue

USAGE:
async fn handler(
    req: Request,        // Full request access
    res: Response,       // Mutable response (set headers)
    tasks: BackgroundTasks,
) -> Json<Data>

REQUEST ACCESS:
- req.headers()
- req.method()
- req.path()
- req.body() (consumes - use carefully)

RESPONSE MUTATION:
- res.set_header(name, value)
- res.set_cookie(cookie)
- res.delete_cookie(name)
- Applied to final response

DETECTION:
- Parameter type matches Request/Response exactly
- No attribute needed
- Order independent in handler signature

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
- All special types inject correctly
- Response mutations applied
- Works alongside other extractors
- Type-safe detection

TEST REQUIREMENTS:
- Unit: Each special type injection
- Unit: Response header setting
- Unit: Cookie setting
- Integration: Combined with extractors","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-17T15:17:35.257022138Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-21T20:03:42.482207146Z","closed_at":"2026-01-21T20:03:42.482160719Z","close_reason":"done","closed_by_session":"SilverHeron-special-params","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["extractors","phase-2","special"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"fastapi_rust-biz","depends_on_id":"fastapi_rust-bfh","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-28T00:10:32Z","created_by":"import"}]}

 {"id":"fastapi_rust-bss","title":"Dependency caching with request scope","description":"Implement request-scoped dependency caching:

BEHAVIOR (per FastAPI spec):
- use_cache: bool = true (default)
- Cache key: (callable, sorted_scopes, computed_scope)
- Same dependency called twice = same instance

CACHE LOCATIONS:
- 'request' scope: Cached for entire request
- 'function' scope: Fresh each call (no caching)

STORAGE:
- Store in RequestContext or dedicated DependencyCache
- TypeId-based lookup for type safety
- Clear on request completion

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
- use_cache=true returns same instance
- use_cache=false returns fresh instance
- Scope rules enforced
- No memory leaks

TEST REQUIREMENTS:
- Unit: Caching behavior
- Unit: Cache key generation
- Unit: Scope isolation
- Integration: Complex dependency graphs","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-17T15:11:08.615093525Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-21T17:01:56.227231922Z","closed_at":"2026-01-21T17:01:56.226790510Z","close_reason":"Already fully implemented - DependencyCache, DependencyScope, DependsConfig, NoCache all in place with comprehensive tests","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["caching","di","phase-4"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"fastapi_rust-bss","depends_on_id":"fastapi_rust-aha","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-28T00:10:32Z","created_by":"import"}]}

Features: route name registration, path parameter substitution with type validation, query parameter encoding, root_path support for reverse proxy, URL encoding/decoding utilities. 27 new tests added.","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["helpers","phase-2","routing","url"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"fastapi_rust-c38","depends_on_id":"fastapi_rust-hfk","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-28T00:10:32Z","created_by":"import"}]}
 {"id":"fastapi_rust-c75","title":"Parameter alias support","description":"Implement parameter aliasing:

ALIAS TYPES (per FastAPI):
- alias: Alternative name in request
- validation_alias: Name for validation
- serialization_alias: Name for serialization

HEADER EXAMPLE:
#[param(alias = 'X-Custom-Token')]
token: String
// Looks for header 'X-Custom-Token' instead of 'token'

QUERY EXAMPLE:
#[param(alias = 'q')]
query: String
// Accepts ?q=value instead of ?query=value

ALIAS PROPAGATION:
if alias is set and serialization_alias is None:
    serialization_alias = alias
if alias is set and validation_alias is None:
    validation_alias = alias

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
- Alias used for extraction
- Alias appears in OpenAPI
- Propagation rules work
- Works with all param types

TEST REQUIREMENTS:
- Unit: Header alias
- Unit: Query alias
- Unit: Propagation rules
- OpenAPI: Alias in schema","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-17T15:13:51.872134286Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-28T22:57:02.052808567Z","closed_at":"2026-01-28T22:57:02.052743396Z","close_reason":"Implemented parameter alias support: alias, validation_alias, serialization_alias fields in ParamAttrs and ParamMeta. Added propagation logic and OpenAPI integration. All tests pass (35 param_meta tests, 30 macro tests).","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alias","params","phase-2"]}

 {"id":"fastapi_rust-ibh","title":"Sub-application mounting","description":"Implement app mounting at path prefix:

API:
app.mount('/admin', admin_app)
app.mount('/docs', static_files_app)

BEHAVIOR (per FastAPI spec):
- Sub-app receives requests with prefix stripped
- Sub-app has independent middleware stack
- Sub-app OpenAPI NOT merged into parent
- Independent state/configuration

USE CASES:
- Mount Swagger UI at /docs
- Mount admin panel at /admin
- Static file serving
- Legacy app integration

DIFFERENCE FROM include_router:
- mount(): Separate app, no OpenAPI merge
- include_router(): Same app, OpenAPI merged

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
- Path prefix stripped for sub-app
- Independent middleware execution
- Independent error handling
- Works with any ASGI-like app

TEST REQUIREMENTS:
- Unit: Path stripping
- Integration: Sub-app request handling
- Integration: Independent middleware","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-17T15:10:16.285453966Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-28T18:41:28.466721749Z","closed_at":"2026-01-28T18:41:28.466659202Z","close_reason":"Implemented sub-application mounting with MountedApp struct, .mount() builder method, and path stripping in App::handle()","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["app","mount","phase-2","routing"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"fastapi_rust-ibh","depends_on_id":"fastapi_rust-7vt","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-28T00:10:33Z","created_by":"import"}]}
 {"id":"fastapi_rust-ieq","title":"RequestValidationError with location tuples","description":"Implement validation error aggregation:

STRUCTURE:
- errors: Vec<ValidationErrorItem>
- body: Option<serde_json::Value> (the invalid input)

ValidationErrorItem:
- type_: String (error type: 'missing', 'string_too_short', etc)
- loc: Vec<LocItem> (location: ['body', 'field', 'nested'])
- msg: String (human-readable message)
- input: serde_json::Value (the invalid value)
- ctx: Option<HashMap> (constraint context)

LocItem enum:
- String(String) for field names
- Int(usize) for array indices

LOCATION PREFIXES (per FastAPI):
- Path params: ['path', 'param_name']
- Query params: ['query', 'param_name']
- Headers: ['header', 'header_name']
- Cookies: ['cookie', 'cookie_name']
- Body: ['body'] or ['body', 'field', 'nested']

RESPONSE FORMAT (422):
{
  "detail": [
    {"type": "missing", "loc": ["query", "q"], "msg": "Field required", "input": null}
  ]
}

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
- Errors collected from all extractors
- Proper location tuples
- FastAPI-compatible JSON format
- Multiple errors aggregated

TEST REQUIREMENTS:
- Unit: Each error type formatting
- Unit: Nested location paths
- Unit: Array index locations
- Integration: Multiple validation errors
- Compatibility: Match FastAPI format exactly","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-17T15:09:50.010991892Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-19T02:32:19.348797686Z","closed_at":"2026-01-18T16:27:26.167074955Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["errors","http","phase-1","validation"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"fastapi_rust-ieq","depends_on_id":"fastapi_rust-zom","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-28T00:10:33Z","created_by":"import"}]}
 {"id":"fastapi_rust-ikb","title":"HTTP parser security hardening","description":"Security hardening for HTTP parser:
- Request line length limits
- Header count limits (max headers)
- Individual header size limits  
- Total header block size limits
- Request smuggling prevention (strict parsing)
- Invalid byte rejection in headers

DEPENDS ON: Request line parser, Header parser

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
- All limits configurable
- Clear error messages for violations
- No ambiguous parsing (strict mode)
- Reject null bytes and other invalid chars

SECURITY:
- CVE: HTTP request smuggling prevention
- CVE: Header injection prevention
- DOS: Resource exhaustion protection

TEST REQUIREMENTS:
- Unit: Each limit enforcement
- Security: Known smuggling payloads rejected
- Security: Malformed header injection attempts

-{"id":"fastapi_rust-iq2","title":"Snapshot testing for response bodies","description":"Support snapshot testing for API responses. Automatically detect unexpected response changes.

Implementation:
- Capture and store response snapshots
- Compare responses against snapshots
- Update snapshots with flag
- Ignore dynamic fields (timestamps, IDs)
- JSON and text snapshot support

Features:
- assert_snapshot!(response) macro
- Inline vs file snapshots
- Field masking for dynamic values
- Diff output on mismatch
- CI-friendly (fail on new snapshots)

Acceptance Criteria:
- Snapshots stored in tests directory
- Comparison detects changes
- Update mode refreshes snapshots
- Dynamic field masking works
- Clear diff output

Tests:
- Matching snapshot passes
- Changed response fails
- Update mode creates new snapshot
- Masked fields ignored in comparison","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-17T16:16:16.512633141Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-17T16:16:16.512633141Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["regression","snapshots","testing"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"fastapi_rust-iq2","depends_on_id":"fastapi_rust-j3v","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-28T00:10:33Z","created_by":"import"}]}
